overview: Rural Entrepreneurship Platform — a full-stack web application helping rural users (farmers, youth, women entrepreneurs) start and run small businesses in agriculture, fishery, poultry, and goat farming. Connects users with expert guidance, field support, training, and resources.
features: Homepage with lead capture and dual CTAs
User dashboard with request tracking, AI results, and progress tracker
AI business suggestion quiz with saved results
Contact page with click-to-call and WhatsApp
Pricing section with consultation, setup, training, and premium tiers
About page with team section (5 members)
Admin panel for managing all leads and cases
Service request system with Case ID tracking
Mobile-responsive design with Green + Blue theme
